label: 添加子节点
description: 把一组独立 scene 节点挂到 parent.focus 之下作为兄弟子节点。每个 nodes 元素是一棵单节点 scene（如 grid2node 的输出）；子节点名取该 scene focus 的最后一段。同名冲突显式报错。
description-en: Attach a list of standalone scene nodes under parent.focus as siblings. Each element of nodes is a one-node scene (e.g. grid2node output); the child name is taken from the last segment of that scene's focus. Name collisions raise an explicit error.

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 父 scene（focus 指向父节点，必须落在已存在节点上）
inputs.description-en: Parent scene (focus must point at an existing node).

inputs.name: nodes
inputs.label: nodes
inputs.description: 要挂入的子节点 scene 列表；每个元素的 focus basename 作为新子节点名
inputs.description-en: List of child scenes to graft; each element's focus basename becomes the child name.

outputs.name: scene
outputs.label: scene
outputs.description: 更新后的 scene（focus 保持父节点路径，便于继续添加 / 接下游 mutator）
outputs.description-en: Updated scene (focus stays at the parent path; chain further add_child / mutator).

outputs.name: childPaths
outputs.label: 子节点路径列表
outputs.description: 实际挂入的子节点绝对路径列表（与 nodes 输入一一对应）；可直接喂 scene_focus_path 定位某个子节点
outputs.description-en: Absolute paths of the grafted children (1:1 with nodes input). Feed into scene_focus_path to target a specific child.
